transcript: Speaker A: Next time, tu mat bolna. Samjha? [Next time, you don't speak. Understood?] Speaker B: Aap yahan English seekhne aaye ho? [Have you come here to learn English?] Speaker C: Haan... um... I learn English. [Yes... um... I learn English.] Speaker B: Nahi nahi, aise bolo: I am learning English. [No, no, say it like this: I am learning English.] Speaker A: Aap suno... sorry haan. And good job. [Listen... sorry. And good job.]
on_screen_text: Client ke saamne... Sirf isliye bezzati hui kyunki mujhe English nahi aati thi. [In front of the client... I was insulted only because I didn't know English.] Boss ne bola: 'Next time, tu mat bolna.' [Boss said: 'Next time, you don't speak.'] Us din decide kiya... bezzati ko motivation banaunga. [That day I decided... I will make the insult my motivation.] Paise nahi the English classes join karne ke. [Didn't have money to join English classes.] koi dost bhi nahi tha jo mujhe english sikhaye...par [there was no friend either to teach me English... but] mujhe mili MySivi App [I found MySivi App] naye dost bane or unhone mujhe English sikhayi [made new friends and they taught me English] meri galatiyo pe mujhe kisine judge nahi kiya [no one judged me for my mistakes] Kuch hi din baad... client ne bada order diya. [A few days later... the client gave a big order.] Aur boss ne kaha: Sorry..Good Job. [And the boss said: Sorry..Good Job.] Agar aap bhi English ki wajah se peeche reh jaate ho... [If you also lag behind because of English...] Toh MySivi app par sirf ₹3 se apni English journey shuru karo. [Then start your English journey on MySivi app for just ₹3.]
summary: An animated story of a man humiliated at work due to poor English. He uses the MySivi app to practice with supportive peers, improves his skills, and wins a major client order. The ad invites users to start learning on MySivi for just ₹3.
